title: Clerical and typographical errors disregarded
doc_html:
Art. 112.  Clerical and typographical errors disregarded

Clerical and typographical errors in this Code shall be disregarded when the legislative intent is clear from the context in which the provision or word is found.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
